faculty.name: Magdalena Klemun
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Hao (Frank) Yang
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Frank E. Curtis
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Researches the design, analysis, and implementation of numerical methods for solving large-scale nonlinear optimization problems, spanning mathematical optimization, machine learning, and algorithm development.

faculty.name: Andrew V. Goldberg
faculty.title: Endowed Chair Professor

faculty.name: Alberto J. Lamadrid
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Researches energy and electricity economics, developing methods for economic decision-making in power grids with high renewable energy penetration, and analyzing resilience of interdependent infrastructure systems after extreme disruptions.

faculty.name: Ted Ralphs
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Daniel P. Robinson
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Researches at the intersection of mathematical optimization and data science, designing, analyzing, and implementing algorithms for solving continuous optimization problems with applications in healthcare and computer vision.

faculty.name: Jennifer K. Ryan
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Lawrence V. Snyder
faculty.title: Endowed Chair Professor

faculty.name: Tamás Terlaky
faculty.title: Endowed Chair Professor

faculty.name: Luis Nunes Vicente
faculty.title: Endowed Chair Professor and Department Chair
faculty.summary: Researches continuous optimization, computational science and engineering, and machine learning and data science, with emphasis on derivative-free optimization and the intersection of optimization with data-driven methods.

faculty.name: Emory W. Zimmers
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Researches enterprise systems and industrial engineering applications. Serves as Director of the Enterprise Systems Center.

faculty.name: Luis F. Zuluaga
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Aida Khajavirad
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Eugene Perevalov
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Researches operations research and decision theory, with focus on systems optimization and analytical methods for complex decision-making problems.

faculty.name: Xiu Yang
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Researches uncertainty quantification, data science, and scientific computing methods with applications in complex engineering systems.

faculty.name: Akwum Onwunta
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Researches uncertainty quantification, statistical inverse problems, scientific machine learning, and optimization under uncertainty, combining applied mathematics, statistics, and machine learning.

faculty.name: Meng Zhao
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Researches advanced AI/ML methodologies for high-dimensional data mining and multimodal data integration, with primary applications in precision health and intelligent transportation systems.

faculty.name: Saurabh Amin
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Ali Aouad
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on algorithms, stochastic modeling, and the design and analysis of marketplaces with social and societal applications.

faculty.name: Hamsa Balakrishnan
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Cynthia Barnhart
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Dimitris Bertsimas
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Giannis Daras
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on generative AI, diffusion models, inverse problems, and data-centric AI approaches.

faculty.name: Joseph Doyle
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Vivek Farias
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on reinforcement learning, statistical inference, approximation algorithms, and their applications to commerce platforms. Patrick J. McGovern Professor.

faculty.name: Gabriele Farina
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Daniel Freund
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: David Gamarnik
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Negin Golrezaei
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Swati Gupta
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on optimization, machine learning, and algorithmic fairness, developing methods for equitable decision-making.

faculty.name: Tommi Jaakkola
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Alexandre Jacquillat
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on stochastic optimization and data-driven decision-making, with applications to analytics for social good and transportation systems.

faculty.name: Patrick Jaillet
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on online optimization and learning, machine learning, and sequential decision making under uncertainty. Dugald C. Jackson Professor of EECS.

faculty.name: Retsef Levi
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Andrew Lo
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Haihao Lu
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Thodoris Lykouris
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on data-driven sequential decision-making, machine learning, reinforcement learning, and dynamic optimization with applications to economics. Mitsui Career Development Assistant Professor.

faculty.name: Thomas Magnanti
faculty.title: Institute Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on mathematical programming, network optimization and design, telecommunications, and supply chains. Institute Professor, MIT's highest faculty honor.

faculty.name: Rahul Mazumder
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on machine learning, convex and discrete optimization, first-order methods, and stochastic and large-scale optimization. Robert G. James Career Development Associate Professor.

faculty.name: James Orlin
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Asuman Ozdaglar
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Pablo Parrilo
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Georgia Perakis
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Chara Podimata
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Manish Raghavan
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on algorithmic fairness, behavioral economics, algorithmic decision-making, online platforms, and game theory. Drew Houston Career Development Professor.

faculty.name: Devavrat Shah
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Andy Sun
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Nikos Trichakis
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Cathy Wu
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Y. Karen Zheng
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Ozlem Ergun
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Kayse Lee Maass
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research applies stochastic optimization, network theory, and facility location modeling to social justice challenges, particularly disrupting human trafficking networks and improving survivor access to services. Director of Industrial Engineering and Operations Research and NSF CAREER Award recipient.

faculty.name: James Benneyan
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Babak Heydari
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Jacqueline Griffin
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Alp Akcay
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Wei Xie
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research centers on interpretable AI, computer simulation, data integrity, and data-driven stochastic optimization for complex cyber-physical systems, with applications in biopharmaceutical manufacturing and smart grids. NSF CAREER Award recipient.

faculty.name: Muhammad Noor E Alam
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research lies at the intersection of operations research, machine learning, and causal AI, developing matching algorithms for robust causal inference from large-scale observational data with applications in public health, energy, and manufacturing. NSF CAREER Award recipient.

faculty.name: Shahin Shahrampour
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Tugce Martagan
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Rifat Sipahi
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Xiaoning Jin
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Sze Zheng Yong
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Laurent Lessard
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Xubo Yue
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on data analytics, statistical methods, and machine learning for engineering applications. Listed under MIE department.

faculty.name: Bruce Ankenman
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Daniel Apley
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Seyed Iravani
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Diego Klabjan
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Simge Küçükyavuz
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Research focuses on optimization theory and methodology, especially mixed-integer programming, large-scale optimization, and optimization under uncertainty, with applications to infrastructure systems and statistical learning. Chair of IEMS and David A. and Karen Richards Sachs Professor.

faculty.name: Sanjay Mehrotra
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Develops methods for decision optimization under uncertainty by studying geometric and algebraic properties of problems. Pioneered risk-adjusted and distributionally robust optimization, with major applications in modeling the US national transplant system. Director of the Center for Engineering and Health.

faculty.name: David Morton
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Develops stochastic and distributionally robust optimization methods for decision-making under uncertainty, with applied work spanning public health crisis response, energy infrastructure resilience, and security-related resource allocation. Walter P. Murphy Professor.

faculty.name: Jorge Nocedal
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Research centers on developing and analyzing optimization algorithms — including noise-tolerant and adaptive sampling methods — for large-scale applications in machine learning, engineering design, and the sciences. Walter P. Murphy Professor and Director of the Center for Optimization and Statistical Learning.

faculty.name: Karen Smilowitz
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Dashun Wang
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.summary: Research centers on the science of science, leveraging data-driven interdisciplinary methods to uncover patterns in scientific careers, collaboration, innovation, and the dynamics of success and failure. Kellogg Chair of Technology and Director of the Center for Science of Science and Innovation.

faculty.name: Noshir Contractor
faculty.title: Professor
faculty.sub_field: Network Science and Computational Social Science
faculty.summary: Investigates how network structures emerge and function in business, science, healthcare, and space travel, advancing computational methods to study algorithmically shaped societies and team dynamics. Jane S. and William J. White Professor of Behavioral Sciences.

faculty.name: Chang-Han Rhee
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Zhaoran Wang
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Ermin Wei
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Minshuo Chen
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Julia Gaudio
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Izzy Grosof

faculty.name: Yiping Lu
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Sean Sinclair
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Naichen Shi
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Zikai Xiong
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.summary: Joining Northwestern IEMS as an Assistant Professor on August 1, 2026. Research interests not yet listed on departmental profile.

faculty.name: Amir Ali Ahmadi
faculty.title: Professor

Research spans scalable convex relaxations for nonconvex optimization and Lyapunov theory for nonlinear and switched systems.

faculty.name: Rene Carmona
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Matias Cattaneo
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Mark Cerenzia
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Jianqing Fan
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Boris Hanin
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Emma Hubert
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Jason Klusowski
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Alain Kornhauser
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Sanjeev Kulkarni
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: William Massey
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: John Mulvey
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Elizaveta Rebrova
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Ronnie Sircar
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Mete Soner
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Bartolomeo Stellato
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Ludovic Tangpi
faculty.title: Associate Professor

Director of Graduate Studies and NSF CAREER Award recipient.

faculty.name: Vaneet Aggarwal
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Barrett Caldwell
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Vincent Duffy

faculty.name: Seokcheon Lee
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Mark Lehto
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: Shimon Nof

faculty.name: Gesualdo Scutari
faculty.title: Professor

faculty.name: David Simchi-Levi

faculty.name: Juan Wachs

faculty.name: Yuehwern Yih

faculty.name: Hua Cai

faculty.name: Harsha Honnappa
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Susan Hunter
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Andrew Liu
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Mario Ventresca
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Brandon Pitts
faculty.title: Associate Professor

faculty.name: Denny Yu
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.summary: Research interests include nonsmooth optimization, stochastic optimization, distributed optimization, and machine learning.

faculty.name: Zaiwei Chen
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Ana María Estrada Gomez
faculty.title: Assistant Professor

faculty.name: Reem Khir

faculty.name: Sivaranjani Seetharaman

faculty.name: Miaolan Xie
